v1.2.0.description:
## SMO Archipelago v1.2.0

### First-time users — start here

**📖 [docs/first-time-setup.md](https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/blob/v1.2.0/docs/first-time-setup.md)** — full walkthrough: prerequisites, multiworld generation, and the SMOClient setup wizard.

### Optional: PopTracker pack

Download `smo-poptracker-v1.2.0.zip` below and
extract it into PopTracker's `packs/` directory.

**🔄 Changing AP server / slot / bridge PC after setup:**
[docs/changing-servers.md](https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/blob/v1.2.0/docs/changing-servers.md)

### Verifying the downloads

```
sha256sum -c meatballs.apworld.sha256
sha256sum -c smo-poptracker.sha256
```


## What's Changed
* Tolerate settings path-validation errors in SMOClient bootstrap by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/258
* Require Pokio to finish Bowser's Kingdom in logic by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/259


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/compare/v1.1.1...v1.2.0
